feature_tested: Fix duplicate ledger entries caused by multiple posting sources

TEST_1_cashbook_blocks_customer_payment.description: Cashbook endpoint correctly blocks customer_payment category with clear error message
TEST_1_cashbook_blocks_customer_payment.expected: 400 error with message directing to Receipts module
TEST_1_cashbook_blocks_customer_payment.actual: 400 error: Category 'customer_payment' cannot be used here. Customer receipts must be created through the Receipts module...

TEST_2_cashbook_blocks_customer_advance.description: Cashbook endpoint correctly blocks customer_advance category

TEST_3_general_ledger_excludes_duplicate.description: General Ledger excludes cashbook customer_payment entries

TEST_4_trial_balance_working.description: Trial Balance endpoint returns valid data
TEST_4_trial_balance_working.actual: Trial Balance returned with summary including assets, liabilities, income, expenses

TEST_5_receipt_creates_double_entry.description: Receipt creates proper double-entry (Dr Bank, Cr Customer Advance)
TEST_5_receipt_creates_double_entry.actual: Receipt rcp_36e04c17 created with 2 entries: txn_40afd1ce (Bank debit ₹5000) + txn_42e10b21e5b9 (Customer Advance credit ₹5000)

TEST_6_gl_shows_both_entries.description: General Ledger shows both primary and counter entries for receipt
TEST_6_gl_shows_both_entries.expected: 2 entries in GL with correct Dr/Cr

notes: Cashbook API view intentionally filters to only cash/bank/digital accounts
Counter entries to liability accounts (Customer Advance) appear in GL but not cashbook view
This is correct behavior - cashbook shows cash movements, GL shows full double-entry
